title: HR Recruitment Manager
published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
desc.1: Move2Cloud Tunisia is looking for an HR Recruitment Manager to support the growth of our teams. You will oversee the entire recruitment process, from defining job profiles to onboarding new employees.
mission.1: Define and implement the recruitment strategy
mission.2: Write and publish job postings on job boards and social media
mission.3: Actively source candidates (LinkedIn, CV databases, referrals)
mission.6: Manage the onboarding of new hires
mission.7: Track HR metrics (time-to-hire, cost per hire)
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in HR, psychology, or social sciences
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience in IT recruitment
profile.3: Proficiency in sourcing tools (LinkedIn Recruiter, Welcome to the Jungle…)
profile.4: Knowledge of IT Cloud / DevOps roles is a plus
profile.5: Excellent interpersonal skills, rigour, and organisational ability
